channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Matt McCarty wins first PGA event at Black Desert Championship
item.description: IVINS, Utah (AP) - IVINS, Utah (AP) — Matt McCarty started the year on the Korn Ferry Tour and now is headed to the Masters, winning his first PGA Tour title Sunday at the Black Desert Championship with a 4-under 67 and one swing that all but sealed it.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Royals keep playoff hopes alive with 3-0 win over Seattle
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - In the second to last home game of the season, the Utah Royals kept their playoff hopes alive for another week, beating the Seattle Reign 3-0 off of a Cloe Lacasse hat trick.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Shohei Ohtani stolen base streak ends at 36 in NLCS, caught for first time since July 22
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers keep on winning in the playoffs, even without a bunch of home runs and stolen bases by Shohei Ohtani.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lions pass rusher Aidan Hutchinson needs surgery after injury to left tibia vs. Cowboys
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Detroit Lions defensive end Aidan Hutchinson was carted off the field with a serious injury to his left tibia on a sack of Dallas' Dak Prescott. Hutchinson was staying in the Dallas area for surgery, Lions coach Dan Campbell said after Sunday's 47-9 win over the Cowboys.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Matt McCarty goes from Korn Ferry to the Masters after winning in Utah for first PGA Tour title
item.description: Matt McCarty started the year on the Korn Ferry Tour and now is headed to the Masters, winning his first PGA Tour title Sunday at the Black Desert Championship with a 4-under 67 and one swing that all but sealed it.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jared Goff throws 3 TD passes, Lions win 47-9 and hand Cowboys another lopsided home loss
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Jared Goff threw for 315 yards and three touchdowns after his completion streak ended on his first throw, and the Detroit Lions blew out Dallas 47-9 on Sunday, handing the Cowboys a fourth consecutive lopsided loss at home.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Doubs catches 2 TD passes in his return from a suspension to help Packers rout Cardinals 34-13
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Romeo Doubs wanted to make amends after serving a one-game suspension for what the Green Bay Packers described as conduct detrimental to the team.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Oregon receiver ejected for spitting on Ohio State player: 'Why even do that?'
item.description: Oregon wide receiver Traeshon Holden was ejected in the second quarter of a game Saturday against Ohio State for spitting on a Buckeyes player.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vasily Espindola and the Redland Chargers take on the Fruita Cowboys
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—In a dramatic 10U football playoff game, the Redland Chargers overcame a 13-point deficit in the second quarter, despite losing their starting quarterback to injury.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: BYU improves to 6-0 after trouncing Arizona, 41-19
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU football team continues to prove all the preseason prognosticators wrong. The #14 Cougars battered Arizona Saturday at LaVell Edwards Stadium to improve to 6-0 for the first time since 2020 with a dominating 41-19 victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Blackhawks visit Oilers in Western Conference play
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (0-1-1, in the Central Division) vs. Edmonton Oilers (0-1, in the Pacific Division) Edmonton, Alberta; Saturday, 10 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Kucherov scores go-ahead goal, two empty-netters to push Lightning past Hurricanes in season opener
item.description: Nikita Kucherov had a third-period hat trick to help the Tampa Bay Lightning beat the Carolina Hurricanes 4-1 in Friday night's season opener for both teams.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: How to cheer on the Padres for NLDS Game 5
item.description: Fans are still cheering on the San Diego Padres as they take on the Los Angeles Dodgers in Game 5 of the National League Division Series Friday evening, following Wednesday's 8-0 blowout.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Former Dodgers pitcher Trevor Bauer sues accuser, says she broke settlement terms
item.description: Trevor Bauer, the former Los Angeles Dodgers pitcher and Cy Young Award winner whose career was upended by sexual assault allegations is reportedly suing his accuser for violating their settlement agreement. According to a TMZ report on Friday, the 33-year-old L.A.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Dodgers will start Yamamoto against San Diego's Darvish in winner-take-all Game 5 of NLDS
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani will get his wish to see Los Angeles Dodgers teammate Yoshinobu Yamamoto face off against San Diego's Yu Darvish in Game 5 of the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Nearly 50,000 participate in 2024 Bank of America Chicago Marathon; downtown street closures in place
item.description: The Chicago Marathon will take place on Sunday, October 13, with thousands of runners and spectators expected to attend, and several downtown streets closures already in place.
item.dc:creator: Anna Roberts, WGN 9

item.title: Video: Wind tears roof off Tropicana Field, home of the Rays
item.description: Hurricane Milton made landfall in Siesta Key south of St. Petersburg, and while the city avoided some of the worst storm surges that doesn't mean the city avoided major effects from the storm.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, KTLA 5

item.title: Mets win, advance to NLCS for the first time since 2015
item.description: NEW YORK — Francisco Lindor hit a grand slam in the sixth inning, his latest clutch swing in an extraordinary season full of them, and the New York Mets reached the National League Championship Series with a 4-1 victory over the Philadelphia Phillies on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mets postseason tickets outsell Yankees on StubHub
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – The Mets and Yankees are both looking to make a run this postseason, but the Amazins are selling more tickets than the Bronx Bombers, according to StubHub. The Mets-Phillies National League Division Series was the best-selling series of the 2024 postseason on StubHub.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, PIX 11

item.title: Blackhawks' rally falls short in season-opening 5-2 loss in Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — The Utah Hockey Club got off to a great start in its new hometown Tuesday night. The Blackhawks' start, meanwhile, was less than ideal. Utah never trailed in a season opener, building a 3-0 lead before holding off a Chicago rally for a 5-2 victory.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Mets take 2-1 series lead over rival Phillies
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Six months of success for the Philadelphia Phillies could be wiped out before the leaves start to turn. With one more loss to the New York Mets, a 95-win regular season would become an afterthought.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Utah Hockey Club celebrates opening game with evening-long Delta Center plaza party
item.description: Just 172 days after it was announced Utah would be joining the National Hockey League, the Utah Hockey Club is set to play its first game in its inaugural season.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Dodgers pitcher robbed at California racetrack: Report
item.description: It's unclear when the incident occurred at Santa Anita Park, located 17 miles northeast of downtown Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Raccoon sparks chaos in stands during Broncos game against Raiders
item.description: Football fans packed Empower Field in Denver on Sunday to watch the Broncos take on the Las Vegas Raiders, but they weren’t the only ones in attendance.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, Fox 5
